commit.message:
Fix Mississippi road trip: resolve stream URL in findCameraOnHighway

The Mississippi bot resolves HLS stream URLs lazily via getStreamsForSite,
but road-trip.js calls findCameraOnHighway directly, which returned url:null.
Override findCameraOnHighway to resolve the stream before returning.

* fix: ホワイトボード作成の強制化（出撃前ハードゲート導入）

ホワイトボードが実運用で作成されなかった根本原因3点を修正:
1. 親方猫の条件分岐による省略 → 中隊以上は無条件必須に
2. 仕事猫のトリガーが親方猫の指示依存 → 出撃前ハードゲート（4項目チェックリスト）に変更
3. パス不一致（multi-agent-neko/status/ vs C:/work/whiteboard/） → WHITEBOARD_DIR変数で統一

commit.message:
Match phone/CapCut encoding to reduce Instagram re-encoding severity

Replace metadata stripping with iPhone-like metadata (Core Media handlers,
isom brand) since blank metadata is a stronger automation signal. Add keyframe
interval (-g 60), maxrate cap (8M), proper bufsize (16M), force 48kHz audio,
and bump audio bitrate to 256-320k to match consumer editor output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add: bundle RustFS into Docker Compose for self-contained object storage

Both quickstart and full-stack compose profiles now include RustFS (S3-compatible)
and a one-shot init container that creates the missioncontrol bucket on first run.
No external storage setup required to get full artifact persistence locally.

Update README and philosophy doc to reflect S3-backed persistence as a
first-class capability, not an optional extra.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Ryan Merlin <ryanmerlin@pm.me>

refactor: reorganize computeruse/ into monorepo scaffold

Move SDK code to sdk/computeruse/, backend API to api/, Celery tasks
to workers/, shared services (db, storage, browser_provider) to shared/,
tests to tests/unit/, and examples to examples/. Update all import
references and fix lint errors. All 98 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: expose GeneratorAgent.instructions so executor sends system prompt

The ACP executor resolves agent instructions via
getattr(agent, 'instructions', None). GeneratorAgent only had
system_prompt, so the curator's system prompt ("Return ONLY a JSON
array") was silently dropped. The agent saw commit data with no
formatting instructions and responded with prose, causing parse_plan
to find no JSON array and report "no curation needed."

Add instructions property as an alias for system_prompt on
GeneratorAgent so all generator agents' system prompts are properly
forwarded to the ACP session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: maverick
repository.description: AI-powered bead-driven development workflow orchestration with autonomous agents and YAML DSL

commit.message:
Add live trading orchestrator — real-time pipeline tying all 6 layers

New orchestrator package connects market data → features → agents →
allocator → risk manager → execution in an async trading loop.

- orchestrator/trading_loop.py: Core TradingOrchestrator with state machine
  (IDLE→CONNECTING→RUNNING→SHUTDOWN), sandbox replay and Tradovate
  WebSocket modes, full pipeline mirroring backtester logic
- orchestrator/contract_resolver.py: MES quarterly contract resolution
  with rollover detection (H/M/U/Z month codes)
- orchestrator/state.py: State persistence via SQLite for container
  restart recovery (account state, daily summaries, metadata)
- execution/sandbox.py: Add async_submit_order() and _live_fill() for
  Tradovate REST order routing in LIVE mode
- api/main.py: Add trading control endpoints (start/stop/status/mode),
  orchestrator lifecycle management, WebSocket trading commands
- Dockerfile: Add orchestrator package to container
- 35 tests passing (12 new orchestrator tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add study-aware biomechanics loading via StudyConfig dispatcher

The base class _load_biomechanics_data() now dispatches through
study_config.import_biomechanics() for studies like AOA that use
Visual3D Excel biomechanics files, while preserving the direct
gonio_path read for preOA goniometer .txt files.

Key changes:
- ReviewGenerator._load_biomechanics_data() dispatches via study config
- _import_biomechanics_via_study_config() locates Motion Capture Excel
  files and returns the first recording's DataFrame
- _find_biomechanics_file() uses study config patterns to locate Excel
- BiomechProcessingGenerator now inherits base class loading (removed
  override that only handled preOA gonio .txt)
- Angle column resolution: rec → study_config.get_knee_angle_column()
  → "Channel_1" fallback
- participant_dir added to discovery rec dict for AOA file lookup
- Fixed None gonio_path handling in plot_page and build_excel_row

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add engineering-reasoning AI prompt and near-miss iteration to optimizer

Replace mechanical "widen pinches" instruction with a proper engineering
reasoning framework that teaches the AI:
- How each pinch point controls power output (with ~2°F = 1-3 MW rule of thumb)
- Near-miss iteration strategy: when a config is within ~3 MW of the band,
  propose 2-3 small pinch variations to walk it in
- Novel fluid exploration: don't abandon a fluid after 1-2 tries, reason about
  WHY it produced its output and what change would move it toward the band
- Sensitivity learning: track how each fluid responds to pinch changes
- Cost-power tradeoff: once in-band, push pinches wider to minimize $/kW

Add "Near Misses & Promising Leads" section to AI context that flags configs
within 5 MW of the band edge with specific hints (tighten/widen pinches).

Add IN-BAND/over/under labels to last batch results so AI sees immediately
which configs hit the target band.

commit.message:
Remove sidebar, move navigation to user dropdown (#59)

* Fix SnapTrade API auth: use correct HMAC signature algorithm

The signing was completely wrong — body+timestamp hex digest instead of
the official SDK's sigObject (content/path/query) with base64 encoding.

Fixes:
- Build sigObject with content, path, query fields per official SDK
- JSON-serialize with sorted keys and compact separators
- Base64-encode HMAC-SHA256 digest (was hex)
- Send clientId/timestamp/userId/userSecret as query params (were headers)
- Only Signature header remains
- Recompute timestamp+signature on each retry attempt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add debug logging and strip whitespace from SnapTrade env vars

commit.message:
fix: kill tmux session before clearing CurrentSession to prevent "already exists" errors

Staleness reset and orphaned-session paths cleared the pipeline's
CurrentSession reference without killing the actual tmux session, causing
FireAdvance to fail on the next tick when it tried to create a session
with the same name. Added CleanupSession calls in both paths and a
defensive kill-and-retry in FireSession.

Fix short put/call Change % sign and color on RR details page

Short legs benefit when the option price decreases, so a price drop
should display as a positive (green) change, not negative (red).

  value always represents P&L from the position's perspective

  (uniform, no more inverted short-leg logic)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add preflight workflow: ATIS, clearance delivery, and taxi events

Sessions now auto-start in preflight with sequential events:
- VFR: ATIS → ground clearance → taxi
- IFR: ATIS → clearance delivery (CRAFT) → ground taxi
- KJAX checkride adds hold-short instruction

Engine fires events one at a time when they require responses,
preventing multiple preflight events from stacking. Phase buttons
now highlight the active phase.

New string keys: atis_report, clearance_delivery_ifr/vfr,
ground_taxi, ground_hold_short, tower_ready, plus preflight
narration and coaching strings (en + es).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: nested color tuples crashed Settings dialog on Corpus tab

COLORS["success"] is already a (light, dark) tuple. Wrapping two of
them in another tuple created an invalid nested tuple that CustomTkinter
rejected, crashing SettingsDialog mid-construction. The partially-built
window was left on screen and couldn't be closed.

Fixed 5 nested-tuple color values across corpus_widget.py and
corpus_dialog.py. Also added cleanup in all 3 settings openers to
destroy partial dialogs on exception so broken windows never strand.

commit.message:
fix(config): resolve default aliases from DEFAULT_ALIASES, not just user config

resolveModel() was only checking user-configured aliases, causing it to
throw when a user had default aliases (gemini, grok, etc.) without
explicitly listing them in their config. Now falls back to DEFAULT_ALIASES
so built-in aliases always work.

Also update skill/SKILL.md examples to use alias names and current model
IDs, and tighten mcp-integration assertions to use toContain.
